name: Aave V3
special_mechanism_summary: Aave V3 uses a utilization-based kink interest model with separate LTV and liquidation threshold parameters. E-Mode (efficiency mode) allows correlated assets to borrow at near-100% LTV, collapsing the collateral margin. Integrated flash loan module allows borrowing any amount up to pool reserves within one transaction for a fee.
notes: C3' combination potential: largest Ethereum lending protocol — reserve state read by every routing and liquidation protocol; E-Mode creates near-zero margin windows enabling self-liquidation paths; Chainlink oracle has a two-block staleness window creating price-change timing gaps; flash loan premium (0.05%) leaves no collateral requirement mid-transaction making the entire pool borrowable.
